_comment: 60K benchmark gate: 197M control vs KD with Qwen3-0.6B (ratio 1:3). Alpha schedule: cooler inverted-U (max 0.40, revised from 0.45 per Codex mid-run review) with 0.05 tail through WSD. Tau 1.2->2.2. Hard eval gates at 3K/6K/15K/30K/60K.
_codex_approval: Tier 2 Review 2026-03-27. Mid-run revision: alpha_max cooled 0.45->0.40 due to heavy-tail activation profile in control. Relative stability gates added.
name: kd_197m_60k_gate

variants._alpha_schedule_explained: 0->0.40 over 0-2K (warmup), hold 0.40 from 2K-40K, decay 0.40->0.05 from 40K-48K, hold 0.05 tail through WSD 48K-60K
variants._tau_schedule_explained: 1.2->2.2 over 0-20K, then hold 2.2. Lower start than 90M (was 1.5) since 1:3 ratio doesn't need aggressive softening
variants._rationale: Codex mid-run revision: alpha_max=0.40 (cooled from 0.45 due to control's heavy-tail activation profile at 15K-20K). Relative stability gates: yellow if KD kurtosis >1.25x control, red >1.5x.
variants._stability_gates: Monitor kurtosis at matched steps. Yellow: KD_kurt > 1.25 * control_kurt. Red: KD_kurt > 1.5 * control_kurt. Gate on lm-eval at 15K (HS/PIQA/ARC-E/WG), not BPT alone.
